text: Everyone's talking about the rocket headed for the Moon, and we are too! Don't miss Rocket Talk LIVE! On Tuesday, March 31 - I'll be hosting the presentation twice at 5:00 pm and again at 7:00 pm!
Get ready for thrills and excitement, and a SONIC BOOM! Falcon's first stage will return and land at LZ-40 just minutes after the launch!
I'll be highlighting this launch at Tuesday night's Rocket Talk LIVE! presentations along with the Artemis II launch. How exciting is that? You're going to see TWO launches in under 24 hours!
